mapper.sql: id, name, weapon_type AS weaponType, CAST(tags AS CHAR) AS tagsJson, sort_order AS sortOrder, is_favorite AS isFavorite, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt
weapon_id AS ownerId, generation AS value
weapon_id AS ownerId, slot AS value
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM weapons ORDER BY sort_order ASC, name ASC, id ASC

SELECT
FROM weapons WHERE id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, name ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM weapon_generations ORDER BY weapon_id ASC, generation ASC
SELECT FROM weapon_slots ORDER BY weapon_id ASC, sort_order ASC, slot ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM weapons WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM builds WHERE weapon_id = #{weaponId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attachment_weapons WHERE weapon_id = #{weaponId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weapons ( id, name, weapon_type, tags, sort_order, is_favorite, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{weaponType}, #{tagsJson}, #{sortOrder}, #{isFavorite}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), weapon_type = VALUES(weapon_type), tags = VALUES(tags), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), is_favorite = VALUES(is_favorite), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO weapon_slots (weapon_id, slot, sort_order) VALUES
(#{weaponId}, #{value}, #{sortOrder})
